content.problemStatement:
You are given an integer sequence A=(A1,A2,…,AN)A=(A_1, A_2,\dots, A_N)A=(A1​,A2​,…,AN​) of length NNN and an integer MMM such that 0≤M<∑i=1NAi0 \leq M \lt \sum\limits_{i=1}^N A_i0≤M<i=1∑N​Ai​.

An integer sequence B=(B1,B2,…,BN)B=(B_1, B_2,\dots, B_N)B=(B1​,B2​,…,BN​) of length NNN is called good if:


0≤Bi≤Ai0 \le B_i \le A_i0≤Bi​≤Ai​ for each 1≤i≤N1\le i \le N1≤i≤N
B1+B2+⋯+BN=MB_1+ B_2+\dots+B_N=MB1​+B2​+⋯+BN​=M
Find the **maximum** value of gcd⁡(A1−B1,A2−B2,…,AN−BN)\gcd(A_1-B_1,A_2-B_2,\dots,A_N-B_N)gcd(A1​−B1​,A2​−B2​,…,AN​−BN​) over all good sequences BBB. Here, gcd⁡\gcdgcd denotes  the greatest common divisor.

**Note:** gcd⁡(a,b,c)=gcd⁡(a,gcd⁡(b,c))\gcd(a,b,c) = \gcd(a,\gcd(b,c))gcd(a,b,c)=gcd(a,gcd(b,c)) and gcd⁡(a,0)=gcd⁡(0,a)=a\gcd(a,0)=\gcd(0,a)=agcd(a,0)=gcd(0,a)=a.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers N,MN, MN,M.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.


Output Format
For each test case, print a single line containing one integer — the **maximum** value of gcd⁡(A1−B1,A2−B2,…,AN−BN)\gcd(A_1-B_1,A_2-B_2,\dots,A_N-B_N)gcd(A1​−B1​,A2​−B2​,…,AN​−BN​) over all good sequences BBB.
